assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response provides gcloud commands setting Saturday 2-6 AM windows with --maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA" for weekend-only maintenance

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Commands include all required flags: --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence with weekly Saturday recurrence

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides Q1 example and templates for Q2-Q4 code freezes, each configured for 30-day periods using --add-maintenance-exclusion flags

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands for November 2024 audit exclusion covering the entire month with no_upgrades scope

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Explicitly states in renewal process section that 'no upgrades' exclusions have 30 days maximum and mentions renewal requirements

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows or clarify that windows only affect auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Regular or Stable release channel and provides commands to migrate to Stable channel for maximum control in regulated environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: All exclusion commands include the required flags: --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, only mentions renewal process
